infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is used to capture business card photos so contact details can be extracted and saved as CRM customer records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo Library access is used to select existing business card or document images and attach them to CRM customer and activity records.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Location is used while using the app to show nearby customers and places on the map and support route planning.

plugins.microphonePermission: Microphone access is used for voice search so users can speak customer, product, and document names in CRM forms.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Speech recognition is used to convert spoken search and input text into CRM form fields.
